TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Telu´ ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Shoufeng, kwara sali buwan nya ga 373 buwan, 1,045 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 25% kyan ku 266 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 75% kyan ku 779 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis24%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. tay 'llaw na Telu´ hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Telu´ hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Telu´ hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Telu´ hya' ga llyung.
S.PHON: alaŋ telu* ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕħou*eŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ**%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. taj ʔllaw na telu* ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na telu* ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na telu* ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na telu* ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ.
S.FORM: alang Telu´ ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Shoufeng, kwara sali buwan nya ga 373 buwan, 1,045 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 25% kyan ku 266 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 75% kyan ku 779 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis24%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. tay 'llaw na Telu´ hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Telu´ hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Telu´ hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Telu´ hya' ga llyung.
S.PHON: alaŋ telu* ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕħou*eŋ, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ**%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. taj ʔllaw na telu* ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na telu* ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na telu* ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na telu* ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ.
